notes: Extended cases for level-order traversal of a binary search tree.

cases.name: sample_level_order_traversal
expect_contains_all: The resulting level-order traversal of the binary search tree is: 20 15 50 10 18 25 80

cases.name: right_skewed_tree_level_order
expect_contains_all: The resulting level-order traversal of the binary search tree is: 10 20 30 40

cases.name: duplicate_values_are_ignored_in_level_order
expect_contains_all: The resulting level-order traversal of the binary search tree is: 20 15 25
